class.name: BlaziumGoapAgent
class.brief_description: An intelligent entity that evaluates goals and executes planned actions natively.
class.description:
[BlaziumGoapAgent] is the orchestration node of the native GOAP module. It requires a [BlaziumGoapWorldState], a container of [BlaziumGoapGoal]s, and a container of available [BlaziumGoapAction]s. On every process tick, it dynamically evaluates the highest priority active goal and instructs the planner to find the cheapest path of actions. It seamlessly switches goals mid-execution if real-time factors shift Native properties. To use, attach this node to an Actor, set its container paths, and call `init(actor)`.
Example structural usage: [codeblock] var agent = BlaziumGoapAgent.new() var action_container = Node.new() var goal_container = Node.new()
action_container.add_child(GatherWood.new()) action_container.add_child(BuildCampfire.new()) goal_container.add_child(GoalSurvive.new())
agent.add_child(action_container) agent.add_child(goal_container)
agent.goals_node = agent.get_path_to(goal_container) agent.actions_node = agent.get_path_to(action_container)
actor.add_child(agent) agent.init(actor) [/codeblock]

method.name: debug_select
method.description: Forces the editor debugger visualizer to highlight this specific agent node for state tracking.

method.name: get_current_action
method.description: Returns the sequence action that the agent is currently attempting to loop via [method BlaziumGoapAction._perform]

method.name: get_world_state
method.description: Returns the global context dictionary attached to this agent.

method.name: init
method.description: Must be called manually! Automatically compiles all child Actions and Goals natively mapping them back to the provided Actor node and starting the planning loop dynamically.

members.member: NodePath pointing to the node parenting the [BlaziumGoapAction] instances available for compilation.
The Goal currently deemed highest priority natively guiding real-time pathing.
An iterated Array listing the actions strictly formulated by the ActionPlanner backwards A* search sequentially.
Allows engine-remote profiler integration via native Godot debugger pipelines natively tracing tree states.
Used dynamically to construct signal headers mapping internally to the Godot Editor tools plugin system.
NodePath pointing to the node parenting the [BlaziumGoapGoal] instances tracking priorities.

signal.name: action_changed
signal.description: Emitted explicitly whenever the Agent completes an action natively and prepares the subsequent execution block.

signal.name: goal_changed
signal.description: Emitted securely whenever evaluation natively overrides the prior goal in favor of a new priority struct.

signal.name: plan_changed
signal.description: Fired safely whenever a real-time path needs absolute resolving natively altering sequence bounds securely!
